A
◉
◎
◎
◎
◎
◎
BT
← Policies

iot-fleet-standard Global scope • 1.2M SIMs

⋮ Actions
v2 Active
v3 Draft
+ New Version
Diff: v2 → v3
Policy DSL Editor Line 18, Col 24
1POLICY "iot-fleet-standard" {
2 MATCH {
3 apn IN ("iot.fleet", "iot.meter")
4 rat_type IN (nb_iot, lte_m)
5 }
6
7 RULES {
8 bandwidth_down = 1mbps
9 bandwidth_up = 256kbps
10
11 WHEN usage > 500MB {
12 bandwidth_down = 256kbps
13 bandwidth_up = 64kbps
14 ACTION notify(quota_warning, 80%)
15 }
16
17 WHEN usage > 1GB {
18 ACTION throttle(64kbps)
19 ACTION notify(quota_exceeded, 100%)
20 }
21
22 WHEN time_of_day IN ("00:00-06:00") {
23 bandwidth_down = 2mbps # off-peak bonus
24 }
25 }
26
27 CHARGING {
28 model = postpaid
29 rate_per_mb = 0.01
30 rat_type_multiplier {
31 nb_iot = 0.5
32 lte_m = 1.0
33 lte = 2.0
34 nr_5g = 3.0
35 }
36 }
37}
DSL compiles OK • 37 lines • 3 rules, 2 actions, 1 charging block
Dry-Run Preview ● Live
Affected SIMs
1,234,567
By Operator
Turkcell
800K
Vodafone
300K
TT Mobile
134K
By RAT Type
NB-IoT
600K
LTE-M
500K
LTE
134K
⚡ Estimated Impact
SIMs throttled ~12%
Quota alerts ~45%
Cost change -₺85K/mo
🔄 Changes from v2
Added off-peak bonus rule
Changed throttle 128→64kbps
Added RAT-type pricing
💾 Auto-saved 30s ago
